case_title: ALLISON BROWN VS. BLACK POINT STUDIOS, LLC., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, ALLISON AS TO DEFENDANT BLACK POINT STUDIOS, LLC., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, ALLISON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLACK POINT STUDIOS, LLC., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $3,360.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,560.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
